traffic_analysis.request:
Test the following web application for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities via HTTP-level
passive checks: sambhavmehra.me

Focus on:
- HTTP security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
- Authentication mechanisms (login bruteforce protection, MFA indicators, session tokens)
- Input validation indicators (error messages that leak SQL/stack traces)
- API endpoint exposure (/api/, /v1/, /graphql, /swagger, /openapi.json)
- Sensitive file exposure (robots.txt, .env, .git/HEAD, backup files)
- CORS policy misconfiguration
- Cookie security flags (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite)
- Clickjacking protection
- Server/technology version disclosure
